hero.title: Software Engineer · Indie Studio Founder · LLM Researcher
hero.bio: Result-oriented Software Engineer with 3+ years in high-stakes financial environments. Currently researching multi-agent batch LLM inference routing at Monash, and leading an indie game studio building narrative games that explore what it means to be seen.
